highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Vidyabharti College of Pharmacy:

faqs.question: Is Vidyabharti College of Pharmacy worth considering?
faqs.answer: Vidyabharti College of Pharmacy is a prestigious institution that offers B.Pharma, D.Pharma, M.Pharma programs. Students have the option to enroll in these courses to start their careers in the Medicine & Health Sciences field. The institute is renowned for its dedicated and experienced faculty members who are committed to delivering these programs. Vidyabharti College of Pharmacy has earned a remarkable review rating of 4.03 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Furthermore, it has received ratings of 4.08 for Campus Life, 3.92 for Placements, 4.25 for Faculty, and 4.08 for Infrastructure.

faqs.question: Which top companies come for placements at Vidyabharti College of Pharmacy?
faqs.answer: Vidyabharti College of Pharmacy offers placement support to its students. Notable organizations that visit the institute for recruitment include Ox Rock India Pvt Ltd, Dag Micro Finance, Cg Electrnics, Renaatus Projects, Deens Constructions, Staff Nurse, Farelabs Pvtltd, Tekton Builders, Bharmaa Software Solutions, Bull Machinery, Intersight Holidays.

faqs.question: How much median salary is offered for B.Pharma course by Vidyabharti College of Pharmacy?
faqs.answer: At Vidyabharti College of Pharmacy median salary for B.Pharma course is INR 2 LPA. Also Vidyabharti College of Pharmacy has earned a remarkable review rating of 4.03 based on student feedback. Furthermore, it has received ratings of 3.92 for Placements.

faqs.question: How much in-campus salary is offered at Vidyabharti College of Pharmacy to M.Pharma students?
faqs.answer: Vidyabharti College of Pharmacy offers in-campus placement salaries in the range of INR 3 LPA to M.Pharma students.

placements.overview: UG Degree (4 year) : In year 2017-18, for 4 year UG Degree, a total of 57 students were admitted at Vidyabharti College of Pharmacy and 55 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 55 students 13 were placed with median salary of INR 200000 and 25 students opted for higher studies. A total of 60 students were admitted in year 2018-19 for 4 year UG degree at Vidyabharti College of Pharmacyand 62 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 62 students 24 were placed with median salary of INR 200000 and 10 students opted for higher studies. PG Degree (2 year) : In year 2019-20, for 2 year PG Degree, a total of 39 students were admitted at Vidyabharti College of Pharmacy and 32 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 32 students 14 were placed with median salary of INR 300000. A total of 42 students were admitted in year 2020-21 for 2 year PG degree at Vidyabharti College of Pharmacyand 38 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 38 students 23 were placed with median salary of INR 300000.

faqs.answer: A:    The Institute takes pride in offering its students a median placement salary of INR 2.2 LPA, that underscores its dedication to preparing graduates for prosperous careers by providing them with a noteworthy and competitive compensation package.
faqs.question: What's the median placement salary that the Institute offers?

faqs.answer: A:    The seats availability for offered courses at Vidyabharti College of Pharmacy goes up to 159. Courses offerred by Vidyabharti College of Pharmacy are approved by eminent Government bodies such as AICTE.
faqs.question: What is the overall intake at Vidyabharti College of Pharmacy for all courses together?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Vidyabharti College of Pharmacy offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.Pharma and D.Pharma. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.Pharma. Vidyabharti College of Pharmacy courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Vidyabharti College of Pharmacy courses stands around INR 12,000 to 2,91,072.

faqs.answer: A:    The fees structure for programs offerred by the Vidyabharti College of Pharmacy is INR 12000 - INR 344000.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied by the, faculty and good placements, best infrastructure and facilities etc.

review_content.Placements: The placements are very good that is so many companies such as sun pharma, dr reddy etc. Took placements and thus placements percentage is at 95% which is good enough for a college to be a best and such bigger companies gave a chance for best students to take their growth at higher level.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of college is quite good comparing to other colleges spacious classrooms and sitting arrangements is good, college has all the facilities such as Wi-Fi, labs and big library, quality of canteen and medical facility is too good but hostel is not there so you have to stay by rent or at a PG, sports and games are competition also held by departments in college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides good facilities and education.

review_content.Placements: Around 30% of students get placed in this course. The highest salary package offered was 7 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 4 LPA. The average salary package offered was about 5 LPA. Companies such as Dr Reddy's Pharmaceuticals, Eisen Pharmaceuticals, etc., visit our campus for recruitment. About 50 to 60% of the students got internships from college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is amazing. The college building has an amazing shape. The plus sign appears on the top of the building. Facilities provided are not so bad. The college has good laboratories and lab assistants. Drinking water is clean. Hostel facility is not available for boys. The food served in the canteen is quite good but is very expensive.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Vidyabharti College of Pharmacy.

review_content.Placements: Only 50% of the students from our course got placed. The highest salary package offered in our course is 5 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. The average salary package offered is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Sun Pharmaceuticals, Dr. Reddy's Laboratories, Meridian Pharmaceuticals, etc., visit our college for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities available in our college are good. The college provides facilities like computer labs, library facility and E-library. Students attend online lectures and also previously missed lectures on the website of our college. Facilities available in the hostel are also good, and they take care of hygiene. Food served in the mess and canteen is also good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: I am absolutely satisfied because of the campus.

review_content.Placements: About 30% of the students from this course got placed. The highest salary package offered is about 6 LPA and the average salary package offered is about 4 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is about 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are Sun Pharmaceuticals, Dr Reddy's Pharmaceuticals and Meridian.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has good infrastructure and facilities such as parking space, a huge sports ground, huge classrooms, etc. But there is no boys hostel on the campus. However, the food served in the canteen is amazing, and there are many indoor sports and outdoor games in our college. Sports tournaments are held here.

reviews_list.review_title: Good Teachers and infrastructure.

paragraphs: Saroj Institute of Technology and Managementadmission 2025is open for various courses. SITM offers BTech, BPharma, MTech, MBA, etc., at the UG and PG levels. The selection criteria are merit or entrance-based. To get admitted to Saroj Institute of Technology and Management, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute. The application process atSaroj Institute of Technology and Managementis conducted online. Read the article to know more about theSaroj Institute of Technology and Managementcourse admission2025.

SITM Lucknow admission 2025is a mix of merit or entrance-based. The university offers more than 15 courses in various streams such as Engineering, Science, Management, etc. The mode of study of the programme is full-time. SITM course admissionis completely merit-based & Entrance exam-based. Students seeking to apply for any of the courses offered at the college must fulfil the admission criteria of the desired programme before applying for it. Candidates looking for course admission must complete Class 12 in one attempt. CUET/UPTACcounselling
Merit-based/*CUET-PG

Saroj Institute of Technology and Management admissionsare a mix of entrance and merit-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at Saroj Institute of Technology and Management is as follows:
STEP 1: Saroj Institute of Technology and Management Application Process 2025

The application mode is online. For admission to the various programmes, aspirants need to apply at the official website, https://seglko.org/. Candidates have to fill up all the details carefully, such as name, mobile number, name of the state, etc. Candidates can fill out the application form on the institute's official website.
STEP 2: Selection

The institute considers various entrance exam scores, such as JEE Main, CUET, etc for admission to the BTech, BPharma among courses. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

The institute also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theSaroj Institute of Technology and Management feeto confirm their seats at the institute.

reviews.review_heading: Good college, with very good infrastructure and proper facilities.
reviews.review_text: There are different laboratories available for different subjects, classrooms are well-maintained with proper facilities like light, fan, AC, smart boards, and 2 libraries. Wi-Fi facility is also available. Hostel facilities are very good with proper rooms, quality of food is also very good. We receive various varieties of food to eat. College always conduct sports and games events for students as well as faculty members.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in the world.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi and laboratories are available with high quality. Classrooms are very good, clean, and well-maintained. The library is also well-maintained. Rooms are excellent, and one notable aspect is that each room has a fan and Wi-Fi. The quality of food provided is very good and nutritious.

reviews.review_heading: Beautiful campus with decent placement. Overall best.
reviews.review_text: Overall, the infrastructure of our college campus is one of the best in Lucknow. We have a clean classroom, a clean campus and the best canteen. The hygiene in hostel food. In our Saroj Institute of Technology and Management campus, they provide almost all the courses.

reviews.review_heading: For the pharmacy course, it is the best.
reviews.review_text: The hostel infrastructure is top-notch. Classrooms are Wi-Fi enabled and the rooms are fully air-conditioned. The library has all essential notebooks and labs are equipped with every mechanical software needed. Canteen facilities are top-notch infrastructure. Currently, in Lucknow, it is one of the best.

reviews.review_heading: The college offers everything to me.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms are present with digital classrooms. Facilities in the hostel are top-notch with a water cooler, refrigerator, and fully air-conditioned rooms. The food quality offered in the mess is top-notch. Medical facilities are offered inside the hostel campus.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good for regular students. For a bright future of students, it is a good choice.
reviews.review_text: The college fee is 1.03 LPA and the hostel fee is Rs. 65,000 per year. It has totally the best facilities. It is a good place. The quality of the food is very good and there is a very rotation shift food and on Sunday, we compulsory get paneer. Paneer is also good in the mess. The food and quality of the food are of very top quality. In labs, all instruments are very useful.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges in Lucknow.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms are present with digital classrooms. Facilities in the hostel are top-notch with a water cooler, refrigerator, and fully air-conditioned rooms. Sports are played by students such as volleyball, basketball, and cricket. Medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges in Lucknow.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms are available. Labs are conducted properly and the library is best where the study is done peacefully. The food quality is very good, and if we have any problem, then medical facilities are available. Sports are performed and sports events are conducted. There are games so we have more fun.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges in Lucknow.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms are present with digital classrooms. Facilities in the hostel are top-notch with a water cooler, refrigerator, and fully air-conditioned rooms. Sports are played by students such as volleyball, basketball, and cricket. Medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges in Lucknow.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in our college are top-notch. Wi-Fi facilities are also top-notch. Classrooms are fully air-conditioned with digital-enabled classrooms. The hostel facility is top-notch. The mess and canteen offer good food. Sports are actively participated.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges in Lucknow.
reviews.review_text: The college is Wi-Fi enabled. Classrooms are fully air-conditioned with smart board facilities. The hostel is decent with all amenities such as a geyser, water cooler, refrigerator, etc. I had the best hostel life and the warden is too good.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for academics.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is outstanding. We have well-equipped labs, a canteen facility, a library facility and a sports facility which help as an extracurricular activity for students. A good drinking water facility is also being provided. There are CCTV cameras on the whole campus and Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: College is good for future.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available at this college are so good and fully Wi-Fi campus, smart classes, and smart and AC library. The hostel facilities are so good like AC rooms fully Wi-Fi and hygiene maintained, a clean kitchen, and security is very tight.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good for the future.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of our college are excellent and modern. Smart classrooms and laboratories are available for practice. The library is fully air-conditioned and has Wi-Fi. The hostel facility is also good, with air-conditioned rooms, full Wi-Fi, and a hygienic kitchen.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Saroj Institute of Technology and Management.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the infrastructure is so good. There are digital classes and ACs. Wi-Fi is also available in our college. The college has a good environment. The hostel is clean and very good. The hostel is very safe for girls. The food in the mess is tasty or healthy and the medical facilities are available.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Apollo MedSkills, Hyderabad provides Part Time programs at the PG and Certificate levels. These courses are available in multiple streams like Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies and Nursing, and have a fee structure of around INR 10,000 to 60,000. PG programs include MBA/PGDM and PG Diploma. Further, the Certificate programs include Certificate.

reviews_list.batch_info: - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with this college because of faculty members, the environment, etc.

review_content.Placements: Dialysis is all about purifying blood through a dialysis machine. Dialysis technician does this process. This course is for 2 years. After completion of the course, we get good salary packages offered. There would be an increment in the salary packages based on our experience. Students can easily get a job in any hospital.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, there are many facilities like free Wi-Fi, sports, etc. Classrooms are well-designed with centralised air-conditioned facilities. For every department, there are required labs like haematology, pathology, microbiology, radiography, dialysis, cardio etc. There is no hostel facility provided by the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely well satisfied with everything.

review_content.Placements: 60 to 90 percent of students were placed in our course. The highest salary is 35 thousand and the lowest salary is 10 thousand and the average salary for the course is 15 thousand. All medical and healthcare providers like Apollo hospital, care hospitals, Yashodhara hospitals, Sunshine hospitals and diagnostics,Vijaya diagnostics and Lucid medical diagnostics come to the campus. Xray, CT, and MRI technicians are the post offered. The highest package offered for my course is above 50 thousand and the lowest package is below 20 thousand and the average package is 25 thousand. Above 60% of students are eligible for the internship.

college_info.college_name: Seth Govindji Raoji Ayurved Medical College: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college for students who like Ayurveda.

review_content.Placements: Internships and jobs are offered for the position of the doctor in our course. Housemanship (both part-time as well as full time) is offered here, and observership is offered for students to gain practical knowledge. Students can also assist surgeries, making ayurvedic medicines like Guti, Vati, Kadha, etc., and handle OPD and IPD as well.
review_content.Infrastructure: The intake capacity of our college is 60 students, so there are only 6 classrooms. The campus has two buildings, and one is old, while the other one is new. The old building consists of all the labs, including anatomy and physiology lab. The new building consists of a library which can accommodate 100 students at a time. There is no Wi-Fi facility for students, and only college computers have access to the Wi-Fi facility. The hostel is situated at a distance of 1.5 meters from the college and hospital. It consists of about 50 rooms, and every room has 4 beds.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with our staff as they are very helpful and also support us a lot.

review_content.Placements: There are no packages as it is a medical college but the education here is best in terms of Ayurveda. Also, this is best as it is granted medical college so fees are quite less as compared to others and also the hospital is near the college at a certain distance.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college hostel for boys is not available but the college infrastructure is quite good. The college is situated near the stand so there is no problem with transportation and also the infrastructure of the hall is quite good and big.

review_summary.college_name: Seth Govindji Raoji Ayurved Medical College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Search_Your_Dream_College

content.Placements: As B.A.M.S. is a medical course, there are no placements through the college. After completing your 4.5 years of B.A.M.S. curriculum, you have to complete one year of mandatory internship, during which you will get a paid fixed stipend of 18,000 rupees per month. After that, several options will open for you, such as opening your own OPD center or going for PG, where you can be paid around seventy to eighty thousand rupees per month. Apart from this, B.A.M.S. students can also go for research or business.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is not so good as the building is too old. Laboratories and classrooms are good with digital classrooms. The library is very good as there are several books available, and the library also has computer facilities. The college hostel is too small as there is not much space to accommodate all the students. There are 14 rooms in the girls' hostel with a capacity of 4 students each. Wi-Fi and induction facilities are available in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for students who like Ayurveda.

content.Placements: Internships and jobs are offered for the position of the doctor in our course. Housemanship (both part-time as well as full time) is offered here, and observership is offered for students to gain practical knowledge. Students can also assist surgeries, making ayurvedic medicines like Guti, Vati, Kadha, etc., and handle OPD and IPD as well.
content.Infrastructure: The intake capacity of our college is 60 students, so there are only 6 classrooms. The campus has two buildings, and one is old, while the other one is new. The old building consists of all the labs, including anatomy and physiology lab. The new building consists of a library which can accommodate 100 students at a time. There is no Wi-Fi facility for students, and only college computers have access to the Wi-Fi facility. The hostel is situated at a distance of 1.5 meters from the college and hospital. It consists of about 50 rooms, and every room has 4 beds.

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with our staff as they are very helpful and also support us a lot.

content.Placements: There are no packages as it is a medical college but the education here is best in terms of Ayurveda. Also, this is best as it is granted medical college so fees are quite less as compared to others and also the hospital is near the college at a certain distance.
content.Infrastructure: The college hostel for boys is not available but the college infrastructure is quite good. The college is situated near the stand so there is no problem with transportation and also the infrastructure of the hall is quite good and big.

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The college is really good, and I am absolutely satisfied with the teaching quality.

content.Placements: Our institute is a medical college. We are doctors. So, no one can get placed on campus. We did a 6-month internship in our college Ayurvedic hospital, 3 months in rural areas and 3 months in a civil hospital. We have to go for post-graduation, or we will get settled privately.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is small, so the college looks like a school. The boys' hostel is not available here. Only a girls' hostel is available. The hospital is far (1.5km) from the college. But the college library is well-designed. Lots of books are available. We can sit there 24/7.

faqs.answer: A:    NTA provided the NEET 2024 application correction facility for the registered candidates wherein they got a chance to make necessary corrections or changes. However, only those candidates submitting the NEET application form 2024 by paying the requisite application fee within the stipulated date were eligible to avail of the NEET application correction facility. Take a look at the process to make the NEET 2024 application correction.Visit the official website of NEET – neet.ntaonline.in.Log in with the NEET 2024 registration credentialsClick on the tab ‘Correction in Application Form’Make the necessary changes provided the fields are editable and allowed for the candidates based on their Aadhaar verification statusClick on SaveDownload the updated Application Confirmation formThere was no additional fee to make corrections in the NEET registration 2024. However, there were a few fields which could not be edited. These fields included name, email ID and mobile number.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has a good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: The highest salary offered is Rs. 100000 per month, and the lowest is Rs. 40000 per month. After completing the course, you will be able to work for yourself or be easily hired in private hospitals.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are good. Libraries are excellent. There is no Wi-Fi in our hostel. The hostel food is good. They provide 3 washing machines with 3 dryers. Medical facilities are available within a 100-meter distance. There are stationery and cafeteria shops inside the campus.
review_content.Faculty: We have qualified and excellent teachers who play the slides and teach them as well. The institute follows the NMC rules and regulations in every aspect. The college comes under MGR University of Medical Sciences. The university exams will be similar to those at other government colleges.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the hardworking faculty and strong anti ragging committee.

review_content.Placements: In our college, no batch passed out since it was started in 2019. But the quality of education is very worthy. Everyone will get a PG seat in government colleges or national-level institutions. Students who plan for PG should prepare from the very 1st year.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no free Wi-Fi available on campus. Our college has an anatomy dissection hall, histology lab, anatomy museum, biochemistry lab, demo room, physiology lab, hematology lab, and amphibian and mammalian labs. Anatomy demo rooms are also available. Early clinical exposure classes and clinical laboratory visits are also arranged.

overview_faqs.answer: KMCH Institute of Health Sciences and Research is a well-known institution for MBBS, DNB courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, KMCH Institute of Health Sciences and Research has a rating of 4.4 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4.2 on campuslife, 4.6 on placements, 4.6 on faculty and 4.2 on Infrastructure.

overview_faqs.question: Is MBBS course available at KMCH Institute of Health Sciences and Research?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, MBBS course is available at KMCH Institute of Health Sciences and Research. KMCH IHS offers MBBS courses at the PG level. To be eligible for the award of the degree, candidates shall complete the course in a maximum period of five and half years from the date of enrolment for the first semester of the course. Candidates must pass Class 12 with Science stream to apply for the MBBS course in this institute.

review_summary.college_name: KMCH Institute of Health Sciences and Research Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: 98% of students get placed in top medical institutions for their PG. Our batch is the one who writes the next exams for PG.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available. It has a secured campus. Labs are nice. The library contains 7 floors with 5,000 books. Computers are available in the library, and we get great information. Healthy and nutritious snacks are provided to us in the evening.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are really good and knowledgeable. They are always free to help us. Here tests and internals are conducted frequently which helps us to ace exams without fear. We are very hopeful and confidently ready to face the university exams. The college provides PG knowledge along with UG preparation and clinical knowledge in the first year itself.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our college has well-trained faculty members, infrastructure, and facilities.

content.Placements: The college is relatively new, with the fourth batch starting this year. In MBBS, there aren't any placements, and in between, we have to wait to see the number of mates getting into PG. While CRRI is concerned, there are special health centers in both rural and urban areas.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel infrastructure is good and newly constructed. There are three rooms, two shared rooms, and one single room, all of which have to be air-conditioned. Wi-Fi is not available throughout the campus. There is a good gym, but for sports, we have to go to another campus, which is about 2-4 km away. The food is average, so don't expect anything special.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Our college has a good infrastructure.

content.Placements: The highest salary offered is Rs. 100000 per month, and the lowest is Rs. 40000 per month. After completing the course, you will be able to work for yourself or be easily hired in private hospitals.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are good. Libraries are excellent. There is no Wi-Fi in our hostel. The hostel food is good. They provide 3 washing machines with 3 dryers. Medical facilities are available within a 100-meter distance. There are stationery and cafeteria shops inside the campus.
content.Faculty: We have qualified and excellent teachers who play the slides and teach them as well. The institute follows the NMC rules and regulations in every aspect. The college comes under MGR University of Medical Sciences. The university exams will be similar to those at other government colleges.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the hardworking faculty and strong anti ragging committee.

content.Placements: In our college, no batch passed out since it was started in 2019. But the quality of education is very worthy. Everyone will get a PG seat in government colleges or national-level institutions. Students who plan for PG should prepare from the very 1st year.
content.Infrastructure: There is no free Wi-Fi available on campus. Our college has an anatomy dissection hall, histology lab, anatomy museum, biochemistry lab, demo room, physiology lab, hematology lab, and amphibian and mammalian labs. Anatomy demo rooms are also available. Early clinical exposure classes and clinical laboratory visits are also arranged.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: KMCH is one of the 1st colleges to get filled even though it was its 1st allotment.

content.Placements: I am in the 1st batch of MBBS in KMCH but still, it's a role model for infrastructure and facilities at MGR University. It's said we will all get placement too. For toppers, they will get to practice in the corporate hospital even. The college maintains strict rules and regulations.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi, yet the library is filled with both hard copies, soft copies, and journals. Labs and facilities are the models as per the MCI guidelines. Hostel is good and it's new and the mess is big and is right next to the hospital. Food served is healthy and there is chapati mostly at noon and night. We can use the hospital canteen. For medical facilities, the hospital is right in front of the hostel but there are not many recreational activities for now as the college is new. The new medical college hospital complex is pretty big.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Infrastructure, facilities, and placements are good.

review_content.Placements: Placement opportunities are good, we don't need to worry about that. Patients flow is much better than other BDS colleges of Jharkhand.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good. There are well-maintained buildings, classrooms, grounds, and more. Labs are also good. Modern classrooms are also available. Hostels are also good, we don't need to worry about that. Food provided is good, and hygiene is a top priority here. Facilities are also good and helpful. The main thing is that patient flow is much better here, than in other BDS colleges in Jharkhand. Our college has modern equipment, so we can practice as much as we can at a higher level.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: College for better dental studies. You must visit this college and you will like it.

review_content.Placements: Specially, there are no placements like IT sectors but you are trained such that you can run your own clinic or get placed in hospitals. Every student gets internships from college for about 1.5 years of the internship period. You get enrolled in every department in BDS for practice. Also, you get internships and placements in local civil hospitals.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is quite good. We have well-maintained classes, buildings, and labs. There is no Wi-Fi in college and classrooms. But there are classrooms with digital boards. Labs are fair enough to get enough knowledge about all things. Obviously there is a proper well-maintained library with lots of books from many authors such that you can get to learn what you want. Librarians are very helpful and kind. Hostel is also quite good but mess needs some improvement. Canteen is also good. There are medical shops also so you can easily get your required medicine.

Vananchal Dental College and Hospital has separate boys and girls hostel with 418 total number of beds.

reviews.review_heading: Best part about this college is that it has a good number of patients which is good for dentistry.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and departments are good. We have to walk all day because most facilities are located upstairs. Labs are neat and clean. There is a library where we can read books until 4:30 PM and can borrow a minimum of two books for 7 days for studying.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure, facilities, and placements are good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. There are well-maintained buildings, classrooms, grounds, and more. Labs are also good. Modern classrooms are also available. Hostels are also good, we don't need to worry about that. Food provided is good, and hygiene is a top priority here. Facilities are also good and helpful. The main thing is that patient flow is much better here, than in other BDS colleges in Jharkhand. Our college has modern equipment, so we can practice as much as we can at a higher level.

reviews.review_heading: College for better dental studies. You must visit this college and you will like it.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite good. We have well-maintained classes, buildings, and labs. There is no Wi-Fi in college and classrooms. But there are classrooms with digital boards. Labs are fair enough to get enough knowledge about all things. Obviously there is a proper well-maintained library with lots of books from many authors such that you can get to learn what you want. Librarians are very helpful and kind. Hostel is also quite good but mess needs some improvement. Canteen is also good. There ar...

reviews.review_heading: College is really good for studies with a lot of practical experience .
reviews.review_text: The campus is really great. It is more than 100 acres in size. The campus is full of trees, and even a small pond is available, with a guest house inside the campus too. The hostel is also okay. Three students share one room in the boys' hostel. Everyone has their own space because the rooms are T-shaped.

In addition, the hospital OPD has the highest number of patients in Bihar, after PMCH, which gives us the opportunity to excel in our knowledge.
content.Infrastructure: Our college recently completed its 10th year of offering MBBS seats. For a relatively new college, the infrastructure is quite good compared to other colleges in Bihar. The campus is fully air-conditioned and well-equipped with laboratories, a library, and a lecture theater. The college is a source of pride for Bettiah.

individual_reviews.title: Comprehensive review of MBBS Life at GMC Bettiah.

content.Placements: MBBS graduates from GMC Bettiah primarily pursue post-graduation through NEET PG or INI CET. Many secure PG seats in reputed institutes across India. While direct placements are uncommon some join government jobs or rural service as medical officers in Bihar and other states.
content.Infrastructure: GMC Bettiah offers developing infrastructure with a functional hospital, lecture halls, labs and library. The hostels are basic but improving, with separate accommodation for boys and girls, mess facilities and 24/7 water and electricity. Ongoing upgrades aim to enhance student comfort and academics.

reviews.review_heading: Government Medical College, Bettiah  -Pride of North Bihar.
reviews.review_text: Our college recently completed its 10th year of offering MBBS seats. For a relatively new college, the infrastructure is quite good compared to other colleges in Bihar. The campus is fully air-conditioned and well-equipped with laboratories, a library, and a lecture theater. The college is a source of pride for Bettiah.

reviews.review_heading: There is an extremely high number of patients, in GMC, Bettiah.
reviews.review_text: All the labs are well maintained. There is an old library, and a new library is to be builded. Girls hostel is inside the campus, but boys hostel inside the campus is not yet completed. Mess is very good. There is a badminton court inside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government Medical College, Bettiah.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is well-constructed. Our classrooms are neat. Our labs are well-equipped with all equipment. Our library is filled with many books, journals, and resources.

reviews.review_heading: Comprehensive review of MBBS Life at GMC Bettiah.
reviews.review_text: GMC Bettiah offers developing infrastructure with a functional hospital, lecture halls, labs and library. The hostels are basic but improving, with separate accommodation for boys and girls, mess facilities and 24/7 water and electricity. Ongoing upgrades aim to enhance student comfort and academics.

review_content.General: Almost 70% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary offered is Rs. 80,000 per month. The average salary offered is Rs. 40,000 per month. Almost 70% of students got internships. Top roles offered are veterinary assistant surgeon, veterinary officer, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides us with all facilities. Our college has Wi-Fi, a library, a hostel, a canteen, etc. Classrooms are well-furnished. The food served in the mess is average. They provide medical and sports facilities. They conduct many games.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.V.Sc. and A.H. - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college, with good teachers and good view.

review_content.Placements: Most of the students got placed in B.V.Sc and A.H course. The highest paid course is MVSC, and the lowest paid course is animal husbandry. Students got recruited in government hospitals, and every student got an internship in the veterinary course in rural hospitals. This is the best college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has almost all facilities like laboratories, libraries, and classrooms. Wi-Fi is not available for students in college. Good facilities are available in college as well as in hostel. The mess offers good food, and the canteen is far from the college. The sports ground is available, and games facilities are also available.

reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with this college.

review_content.Placements: About 80% of the students from our course got placed. The highest salary offered was 1 lac per month and the lowest salary offered was Rs. 32,000 per month. The average salary offered was Rs. 62,000 per month. Mainly government companies visit our college for placements. About 80% of the students from our course got an internship in government institutes. Our college makes us know how to treat animals, their behaviour, treatment and all information which one veterinarian needed.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Government Medical College, Bharatpur.

review_content.Placements: Our batch has 150 students. Clinical postings are offered. It is an average college. You can choose other colleges.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are average. The construction is going. They may build many hostels. There is a central library. Mess food is good. There is a special dish every weekend. Wi-Fi is not available. Sports competitions are held frequently.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members are very good and supportive. There are many faculty members. Our curriculum is new, which is a great step for our future. Semester exams are held once or twice a year, depending on your year. The pass percentage is 50% for the main theory and practical exams. Semester exams also have the same criteria.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is ultimately good.

review_content.Placements: We don't get placements in the medical field. We do internships after completing our graduation. Students mostly do internships in the hospital attached to the college. For our college, there is an RBM hospital in Bharatpur. The government has fixed interns with a stipend of Rs. 14,000 per month recently in Rajasthan.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is nice and better than many other medical colleges in Rajasthan. But hostels are not recently available for boys on the campus. It is available only for girls in upcoming batches. Classrooms are air-conditioned, but Wi-Fi facilities are not available on the campus. Libraries are good with books for all subjects. The quality of food served in the mess is average. There is a cooperative mess, which is operated by students only. Sports and games are not conducted very frequently.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides good faculty members, facilities, and education.

review_content.Placements: We don't get placements in the medical field. We can go for the internship after our graduation. Students mostly do internships in the hospital attached to their college. For our college, it is RBM hospital in Bharatpur. The government has fixed interns stipend as Rs. 14,000 recently in Rajasthan.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is better than many other medical colleges in Rajasthan. But hostels are not recently available for boys on the campus. It is only available for girls in upcoming batches. Classrooms are air-conditioned. But Wi-Fi facilities are not available on campus. Libraries are good with books for all subjects available. Food quality in the mess is fine. There is a cooperative mess which is run by students themselves. Sports and games are not much frequent.

For our college, there is an RBM hospital in Bharatpur. The government has fixed interns with a stipend of Rs. 14,000 per month recently in Rajasthan.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is nice and better than many other medical colleges in Rajasthan. But hostels are not recently available for boys on the campus. It is available only for girls in upcoming batches. Classrooms are air-conditioned, but Wi-Fi facilities are not available on the campus. Libraries are good with books for all subjects. The quality of food served in the mess is average. There is a cooperative mess, which is operated by students only. Sports and games are not conducted very frequently.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of the faculty members, very good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided by the college are good. Wi-Fi is available in the library. Students' and faculty members' libraries are separate. All departments have separate floors in the college. Facilities in the hostel are good compared to other medical college hostels. Mess food is nutritive, and a canteen is also available on our college campus.

reviews.review_heading: In this college, study is good, and the results in this university exams are good.
reviews.review_text: Hostel buildings are well. The canteen is provided in the academic block. Mess food is average. Medical facilities are available as it is a medical college. Sports and games are there on Saturdays. Laboratories for all needed subjects are present. Classrooms are air-conditioned classrooms, but Wi-Fi facilities are not available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government Medical College, Bharatpur.
reviews.review_text: The library is very good here, and all medical-related books are available here. The classrooms and labs are well-equipped with instruments that are in good working condition. The hostel rooms are double sharing based and have an attached washroom and balcony. The mess is operated by the students and provides good quality and hygienic food. The menu gets changed every month to include seasonal vegetables also.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied by faculty members and staff. Placements are good, but infrastructure can be improved.
reviews.review_text: No Wi-Fi is available on the college campus and hostel. All labs are provided. We have a physiology lab, biochemistry lab, dissection hall, etc. Library is available with a moderate amount of books on all subjects. The quality of food served is average. The canteen food is good and prices are also reasonable. All sports are there on our campus and medical facilities are also available all the time. The hostel rooms are also very spacious and clean.

reviews.review_heading: The college is absolutely good because of teachers and seniors.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are good in the college. All the departments are good. The lecture theatres, classrooms and demo rooms are well furnished and air-conditioned. Labs are good and well-equipped.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government Medical College, Bharatpur.
reviews.review_text: The college is average, and the food is average. There is no canteen. Sports, gym, and medical facilities are available. Sports are conducted from time to time. An annual function is organised. A central library is available and is fully air-conditioned. Lecture theatres are good.

faqs.answer: A:    Faculty of Veterinary Sciences & Animal Husbandry offers courses such as BVSC, MVSC, M.F.Sc. The courses are available in full-time mode. Faculty of Veterinary Sciences & Animal Husbandry has specializations such as Veterinary Science, Genetics, Fisheries Science.
faqs.question: What specializations do Faculty of Veterinary Sciences & Animal Husbandry offer in their courses?

review_content.Placements: The SKUAST-K is a well-decorated institute with a good administration. Placements are based on the government order through their office. Both contractual and permanent jobs are offered with an average pay between Rs.25,000-50,000. The deserving candidates are selected on their achievement in the vivas for that post.
review_content.Infrastructure: The institute has decorated & well-developed classrooms with a minimum capacity of 100 students. The institute has a library open during the daytime which also have Wi-Fi facility. Separate labs for every department is present with a new fresh sample of specimens also. Sports and games are also played on the campus with the decorated ground for cricket and football, and volleyball. The institute also has a gym centre for fitness of the students.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.V.Sc. in Veterinary Physiology - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: My experience at SKUAST Srinagar.

review_content.Placements: After graduating from this college, you have a good opportunity to get selected in JKPSC. Also, various companies come here for placement sessions. The placement ratio is good and at least 30 students out of 45 get placed every year. Also, some students go for research in veterinary sciences.
review_content.Infrastructure: SKUAST is known for its infrastructure it is surrounded by Dal lake, adding to its beauty. Furthermore, the college has good labs and the best canteens. It has a good Wi-Fi facility and the location of the college is the best. Besides this, classrooms are high-tech in nature. Here we are being taught through projectors when needed. Also, the college has a big playground for sports.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2030
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the college facilities.

review_content.Placements: We are still in college. We are doing BVSC AH, which has a very good placement rate in the government sector. Top posts offered after doing BVSC AH are veterinary assistant surgeon and veterinary officer, with a very healthy starting package of around 10 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Well-maintained labs are provided. Well-ventilated classrooms. Library facility is also available. Hostel facilities are also too good. There is a well-maintained hostel ground, where we can play any sport. There is also a canteen within the college.

review_summary.college_name: Faculty of Veterinary Sciences & AH Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: A good institute for studies and provides a good environment too.

content.Placements: The SKUAST-K is a well-decorated institute with a good administration. Placements are based on the government order through their office. Both contractual and permanent jobs are offered with an average pay between Rs.25,000-50,000. The deserving candidates are selected on their achievement in the vivas for that post.
content.Infrastructure: The institute has decorated & well-developed classrooms with a minimum capacity of 100 students. The institute has a library open during the daytime which also have Wi-Fi facility. Separate labs for every department is present with a new fresh sample of specimens also. Sports and games are also played on the campus with the decorated ground for cricket and football, and volleyball. The institute also has a gym centre for fitness of the students.

individual_reviews.course: M.V.Sc. in Veterinary Physiology - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: My experience at SKUAST Srinagar.

content.Placements: After graduating from this college, you have a good opportunity to get selected in JKPSC. Also, various companies come here for placement sessions. The placement ratio is good and at least 30 students out of 45 get placed every year. Also, some students go for research in veterinary sciences.
content.Infrastructure: SKUAST is known for its infrastructure it is surrounded by Dal lake, adding to its beauty. Furthermore, the college has good labs and the best canteens. It has a good Wi-Fi facility and the location of the college is the best. Besides this, classrooms are high-tech in nature. Here we are being taught through projectors when needed. Also, the college has a big playground for sports.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the college facilities.

content.Placements: We are still in college. We are doing BVSC AH, which has a very good placement rate in the government sector. Top posts offered after doing BVSC AH are veterinary assistant surgeon and veterinary officer, with a very healthy starting package of around 10 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Well-maintained labs are provided. Well-ventilated classrooms. Library facility is also available. Hostel facilities are also too good. There is a well-maintained hostel ground, where we can play any sport. There is also a canteen within the college.

The quality of the food is also good, and a variety of dishes are available. Our college has a basketball court and a volleyball court.

overview_faqs.answer: CMR College of Pharmacy is a prominent institute of Pharmacy studies located in Hyderabad. The institute is a known institute, and is approved by UGC as a 12B, 2f, and a Science and Industrial Research Organization (SIRO). admission_process.title: CMR College of Pharmacy Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: CMR College of Pharmacy admission is entrance-based, followed by counselling in 70% of seats for all the courses. The college offersBPharma, MPharma, and PharmDat the UG, PG, and PhD levels, respectively. Admission to all the courses is open, candidates are required to fill out the eligibility criteria before applying for admission.CMR College of Pharmacyaccepts various exams such asTSEAMCET, TSPGECETandGPATfor admission to UG, PG, and PhD courses for 70% of seats. Further, 30% of seats are reserved for management quota. Admission to management quota seat is based on the last-qualifying exam score. To get admission, candidates are required to fill out the criteria set by the college and apply on the college's official website. Read the complete article for more detailed information aboutCMR College of Pharmacy admission 2025, course-wise eligibility, selection, course fee, and seat intake:

CMR College of Pharmacy admission 2025 is ongoing. Applicants must fill out the course-specific eligibility criteria for admission. Admission to 70% of seats is based onTSEAMCET,TSPGECET and GPATentrance exams, followed by counselling.Admission to 30% of seats is merit-based via management quota. The below table contains detailed information aboutCMR College of Pharmacy courseeligibility and selection criteria:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Class 10 and Class 12 or equivalent from a recognised board
TS EAMCET/ Merit*+ Counseling
Graduation degree from a recognised board
TS EAMCET/TS PGECET/ Merit* + Counseling
Graduation degree from a recognised board
GPAT/ TS PGECET Merit* + Counseling
*Note: 30% of seats are offered via Management quota.

CMR College of Pharmacy admission process contains various steps which have to be followed by the applicants for admission. The admission process begins with filling out the registration form, appearing in the accepted entrance exam and counselling round and final seat confirmation. Applicants searching for admission to any courses must appear for the entrance exam accepted by the college. Go through the given steps to know more about the CMR College of Pharmacy admission process 2025:

STEP 1: CMR College of Pharmacy Application Process 2025Candidates must fill out the CMR College of Pharmacy admission eligibility criteria and selection criteria for all courses. After that, candidates are required to fill out the application form online on the official website of the college.STEP 2: Selection RoundCMR College of Pharmacy offers admission to candidates on 70% of seats via entrance exam score. Further, the college reserves 30% of seats for the management quota. The college offers 70% of seats under Convener Quota via TS EAMCET. TS PGECET and GPAT, followed by counselling for admission to UG, PhD and PG courses, respectively. Additionally, candidates are required to fulfil the eligibility criteria for a particular course to be eligible for direct admission via management quota.STEP 3: Final Seat Allotment/Fee SubmissionFor final seat allotment, the college releases the merit list on its official website. After candidates get shortlisted based on their merits, they are required to pay theCMR College of Pharmacy feeto lock in their seats.

faqs.answer: CMR College of Pharmacy offers admission where 70% of seats are based on entrance exam scores, and 30% are based on the last qualifying exam. faqs.question: Is CMR College of Pharmacy admission open?
faqs.answer: Yes, CMR College of Pharmacy admission are open for all the courses. Applicants willing to get admission must know the eligibility criteria and apply accordingly before the last date. faqs.question: What are the top courses offered at CMR College of Pharmacy?
faqs.answer: CMR College of Pharmacy offers three programs at the undergraduate, postgraduate and doctoral levels in the field of pharmacy. Candidates aspiring for admission to any courses are required to apply and appear for the state-level entrance exams i.e., TS EAMCET, TS PGECET and GPAT, followed by counseling. Further, the college also offers 30% of seats via management quota. Admission to the quota seat is based on the last qualifying exam scores. The basic eligibility criteria for admission to UG courses is to pass Class 12 from a recognised board and for admission to PG and PhD courses pass UG degree.

hostel_campus.college_name: CMR College of Pharmacy Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Well-qualified teacher and excellent placements.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure was awesome. The classrooms were neat and clean with comfortable benches. The labs were well-equipped with air conditioning. We had a huge library. The Wi-Fi facility was also available. The hostel facilities were good. The canteen mess was good. The medical facilities were good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is a famous college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is good. The equipment in the labs is advanced and good. The classrooms also contain projectors, which help students understand better. Wi-Fi is available. The library is good. The hostel facilities are good. The canteen is also available. There are sports facilities like cricket and volleyball.

reviews.review_heading: College is excellent and everything is good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided were Wi-Fi on campus, and more extra classes were taken at our college. Classrooms were large, and the labs were well-equipped with air-conditioned. The high library facilities provided more books. The hostel facilities were good. Canteen was also available.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college, but it has strict rules.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are average, so I suggest others not to expect high. Labs are with low infrastructure. Canteen is average, but food quality and the taste is good. It has hostel facility, and it charges Rs. 70,000 per annum. Sports and games are not available, and they can't give a cricket bat.

reviews.review_heading: CMR College of Pharmacy is a good college if you only choose to pursue your B.Pharmacy degree.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our campus is not up to the mark. Only certain departments of laboratories in our institute are well equipped. The library is also good as it provides us with various journals and the latest editions of textbooks for the students to refer. Canteen is good, but it's not up to the mark. The quality of food served keeps differing.

reviews.review_heading: I'll not recommend this course as it doesn't have scope in India and fee is also too high.
reviews.review_text: Open GATE campus with good infrastructure and green environment having play ground. College has its own hostel for boys and girls separately. Food is of good quality. Will have sports classes. But not that much regular. Each block has it's own library.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college with excellent infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides high-speed Wi-Fi with regular labs and lab equipments like laminar air flow, autoclaves, incubators, and computers. There are projectors in air-conditioned classrooms, records, viva, assignments, an excellent hostel with full security, and good infrastructure. Not only studies but sports and cultural activities are also encouraged.

review_content.Placements: Around 150 seats for bachelors and some PG seats are provided in our college. Education is practical-based and all lectures are best.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our campus is not well-developed but has a very high patient flow. Hostel is not available on campus but it is 2 km away from the college due to a lack of land. review_content.Faculty: All the students of our college pass the exams. The quality of education provided in our college is good. Faculty members are the best in the respective subjects. The course curriculum makes students future doctors to serve India. There are two internal exams, vivas, and one pre-final exam and at the end of the year, a university exam is conducted. All subject faculty members available in our college are experienced.

college_info.intro: BSc is one of the most popular offerings at the Maharajas Institute of Medical Science. Maharajas Institute of Medical Science provides a total of 16 courses in Allied health science. The names of these courses include Cardiac Technology, Operation Theatre Technology, Medical Lab Technology, Anesthesia Technology, Physician Assistant, Nutrition and Dietetics, Radiology and Medical Imaging Technology, BASLP, Nursing, Optometry, Emergency Medicine, Public Health, Clinical Psychology, Health Inspector, Hospital Administration, and Microbiology. Below are the details regarding the Maharajas Institute of Medical Science's popular programmes:

placements.overview: Maharajas Institute of Medical Science has a dedicated Training and Placement Cell that strives to maintain strong and long-lasting relationships with leading organizations and prepare students for the dynamic healthcare world. The T&P Cell oversees recruitment activities and organizes training programs, pre-placement talks, mock interviews, and expert sessions to make students globally relevant and ready as per industry requirements. Below are the key highlights of placement at Maharaja Institute of Medical Science.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Candidates willing to take part in the Maharajas Institute of Medical Science admission process must apply before the last date of application. Candidates must know their Maharajas Institute of Medical Science eligibility criteria before applying online. At the UG level, the Maharajas Institute of Medical Science offers BSc in various specialisation such as Cardiac Technology, Operation Theatre Technology, Medical Lab Technology, Anesthesia Technology, Physician Assistant, BASLP, Nutrition & Dietetics, Optometry, Hospital Management, and others. Additionally, the institute offers in various disciplines such as Cardiac Technology, Operation Theatre Technology, Medical Lab Technology, Anesthesia Technology, Physician Assistant, BASLP, Nutrition and Dietetics, Optometry, Hospital Management, GNM, and others.

review_summary.college_name: SUT Academy of Medical Sciences Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Really a nice and student-friendly campus.

content.Placements: A batch consists of about 100-150 students. It varies according to NMC regulations per year. The MBBS course is for 4.5 years which includes classroom learning and a one-year internship. Our college provides internships to all students who complete MBBS here. There are no campus placements in this college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. There is a student-friendly campus. The hostel is awesome. It can accommodate 3 students per room. The mess is clean and hygienic. Bathrooms are good. Washing machines and laundry facilities are available.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: College only for study; Infrastructure is average.

content.Infrastructure: There is no playground. No college trip. No quality food. The principal and teachers always ask us to study. No entertainment. College life is poor. College does not provide extracurricular activities.
content.Faculty: My teachers are good. 50 is the pass percentage. There is no revaluation for us. No re-totaling because of digital valuation. The evaluation is too tight. Students get year back when they fail by 1 mark
content.Other: The administration is too bad. No college trip, fun, entertainment, etc.

faqs.answer: Navsahyadri Education Society's Group of Institutions has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityAfter 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th Std./ SSC examination or its equivalent, with at least 35% aggregate marks.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed minimum three year Bachelor's Degree in any discipline or its equivalent with above mentioned marks (45% in case of candidates of backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) from any of the Universities recognised by UGC or AIU.B.E. / B.TechCandidate who have passed Diploma in Engineering & Technology & obtained at least 45% marks (40% marks for Backward class, EWS & PWD candidates belonging to Maharashtra State only) can also apply.D.PharmaCandidate passed 10+2 (science stream) with Physics, Chemistry and Biology or Mathematics or Any other qualification approved by the Pharmacy Council of India from any recognised institute/board are eligible

hostel.description: Separate hostel facility is for boys and girls

library.description: Digital library with NPTEL, e-Journals and over 3500 book titles
Digital library with NPTEL, e-Journals and over 3500 book titles

hostel.description: Separate hostel facility is for boys and girls

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied. I got the best memories of life and also made the best friends.
reviews.review_text: The college had the best infrastructure, with a large entrance gate, a big playground, and separate hostels for boys and girls. Canteen and mess facilities, a lab for each subject, machine labs, and libraries for every department. Bus facilities, Wi-Fi for hostels and all departments in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Navsahyadri Education Society's Group of Institutions is the best college for all students.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good. The food quality is excellent. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled. They conduct all sports activities. It is a good college for placements. We have a good environment and a friendly campus. Navsahyadri Education Society's Group of Institutions is the best college for your career.

reviews.review_heading: Good college campus with a high placement chance.
reviews.review_text: College environment is good and helpful for study purposes. It provides higher quality facilities and free Wi-Fi and good condition. There is a AC library which includes all books and pharmacy books and is useful for study. Canteen is located near the college and just 50 meters away to provide high-quality food.

reviews.review_heading: College structure and environment are good for study.
reviews.review_text: College provides high-quality library and classrooms. Free Wi-Fi and purified water are available. The labs are clean and neat with appropriate chemicals and apparatus. It provides high-quality hostel conditions and rooms with bed, hot water, and filter water.

reviews.review_heading: College has absolutely good placements.
reviews.review_text: College have unlimited Wi-Fi service. Labs are fully built with appropriate instruments and chemicals which is needed on the platform. The facilities of the hostel are very beautiful including the hot water services, cleaning staff, and many more things.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty, good placements in 2022.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities are available in the department, such as Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, labs with all equipment, and a library with various books. You can also take books home for study with zero charge. The hostel is also good. The quality of food in the mess and canteen is good. They maintain hygiene. Medical facilities are available. Many sports equipment and sports grounds are available.

reviews.review_heading: Navsahyadri Institute of Pharmacy: What You Need to Know Before Applying
reviews.review_text: The college has its hostel on campus. The hostel fee is 35,000 per year and includes facilities such as free Wi-Fi, grounds, and purified water. The quality of the mess is not very good. The college has an omni van for hostel students in case of a medical emergency. Hostel students are provided with sports equipment such as bats, balls, and volleyball.

reviews.review_heading: Focus on its unique qualities, such as campus culture, academic programs
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is best for the nature surrounding. Labs are fulfilled with chemicals in our college. The labs and classrooms are clean and neat fulfilled with projectors and much more facilities. In the library, the AC hall is available and all types of books are available.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty and infrastructure .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the B Pharmacy department is quite impressive. They keep all the classrooms, laboratories, and seminar halls clean and well-organized. For teaching purposes, projectors are frequently used, which helps make learning more interesting. Hostels are fine; they provide rectors on each hostel's ground floor, and the cleaning staff keeps all the surrounding areas clean. However, the mess's lunch and breakfast are sometimes too oily.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for middle class students.
reviews.review_text: My college offers a good hostel and mess service. The library is open up to 8 p.m. The gym and other things are very good. There is a lot of ground available at the college. Every year, the college organizes sports competitions and other competitions that help the overall growth of students.

reviews.review_heading: The campus is good but not the best.
reviews.review_text:
There are no good hostel condition. Because it does not provide proper facilities to students. 
There are many issues, like light problems and water problems. 
And also, the food in the hostel is not good because there are many issues and the food is not satisfying to all.

reviews.review_heading: Good teaching staff with experience.
reviews.review_text:
No Wi-Fi has been provided to pharmacy college. Class room labs are best provided with board. 
Hostel rooms are good, but the mess was not good. Medical facilities for girls are provided. Sports like kabaddi, khokho, cricket, badminton, chess, and dodge ball are held.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college because it includes everything that students need.
reviews.review_text: All classrooms are excellent. E-classrooms are available. Wi-Fi is available in all classrooms. All departments are good. Air-conditioned labs are available. Hostels are good for girls and boys. The quality of food in the canteen is good. Medical facilities are available. Games and sports are available. The playground is huge.

reviews.review_heading: It is an urban area, but future opportunities are bright.
reviews.review_text: The campus is very good. There are many facilities, like a library, a reading room, labs, digital classrooms, etc. There are separate hostels for girls and boys. Every facility is available. They serve breakfast, lunch, and dinner on time. The taste is good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is an average college.
reviews.review_text: Almost all the classrooms are digital with projectors. There is Wi-Fi facility available on the campus. For the students residing far from college, hostel facility is available. There are separate hostels for boys and girls provided 24 hours and also mess is available.

faqs.answer: A:    NRI Institute of Medical Sciences is a well-known institution for MD, MS, MBBS courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. NRI Institute of Medical Sciences has course specializations in Anaesthesia, Biochemistry, Dermatology, General Medicine, Microbiology, Pediatrics, Pathology, Psychiatry, Radiology, Community Medicine, Obstetrics & Gynecology, Ophthalmology, ENT, General Surgery, Orthopaedics.

reviews_list.review_title: College life and the follow-up view of medical colleges.

review_content.Placements: I am from the MBBS final year, and after this, I have to do an internship in our attached hospital. Based on our MBBS certificate, we can get jobs as medical officers in the primary health care center, become tutors in medical colleges, or join as junior doctors in the hospital.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are very big and well-ventilated, with AC facilities. The classrooms are digital, and there is also a chalkboard. We have a central library for UG and PG students separately, and all the subject books are available. We have a separate reading room for all students and separate waiting halls for both girls and boys.

reviews_list.student_name: Parvata Sri Sai Prabha Nagesh Anudeep
reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is a decent college for medical aspirants.

review_content.Placements: Almost all the students got placed by the end of the course, as it is an MBBS degree. The internship program is pretty decent in our college. The faculty are friendly. Most of the students go for post-graduation preparation anyway. As the college is on the outskirts of Visakhapatnam, so pretty high OP cases are seen.
review_content.Infrastructure: The lab equipment is modern and decent. There is a thousand-bedded hospital linked to the college. Many OP cases are seen each day. The college is air-conditioned. The college has 4 seminar halls and an auditorium with practical labs for each department.

individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure is really good.

content.Placements: It depended on students, whether they got PG admission or not. If they were admitted to a government college. Their salary might have ranged from Rs.60,000 to Rs.70,000, depending on the branch they were selected for through the NEET PG examination. Those who were not selected might have joined for Rs.14,000 in colleges.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was actually good in the college, and that was one of the best things to be admired. The only issue was that sometimes the AC didn't work in some galleries. The college hostel was somewhat of a place students wouldn't prefer to live due to the food. Though the quality was maintained, the taste was very bland.

content.Infrastructure: Our hostel is moderately good and has an attached bathroom with a shower. Our hostel rooms are spacious. Our college classrooms and labs are top-notch, and our library is very superb and has all the books we require. It has excellent infrastructure.

individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the faculty members who look after us as their children and good infrastructure.

content.Placements: The college provides an internship in our college only for one year. We are lucky that we have a very good college and hospital to do an internship. We gain so much experience so that we get such confidence when we go outside and settle as doctors. About 50% of the seniors got their PG seats.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides very good labs with good facilities and good microscopes. The college provides the best classrooms with air-conditioner, comfortable seats, projector and screen so that everyone can see clearly. There are the best author books in the library, and everyone gets cubicle so that we can read comfortably. Hostel rooms are always good. Quality of food served is improving these days. Our college has to improve the section of sports and games in our college.

admission_process.title: NRI Institute of Medical Sciences Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: NRI Institute of Medical Sciences admissions are entrance-based. The institute accepts scores in NEET, NEET PG, and Andhra Pradesh NEET PG, etc.NRI Institute of Medical Sciencesoffers courses at UG level in Medicine and Health Sciences stream. The institute offers MBBS for 66 months in various specialisations. Candidates can fill out the application form online for admission.

The total tuition fees for UG course isINR 1,14,697. Aspirants have to pay the programme fees at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the institute. The total fees may also include other components such as caution deposit, hostel fees, etc.

hostel_campus.college_name: NRI Institute of Medical Sciences Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is really good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was actually good in the college, and that was one of the best things to be admired. The only issue was that sometimes the AC didn't work in some galleries. The college hostel was somewhat of a place students wouldn't prefer to live due to the food. Though the quality was maintained, the taste was very bland.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good overall and has good infrastructure and great faculty.
reviews.review_text: Our hostel is moderately good and has an attached bathroom with a shower. Our hostel rooms are spacious. Our college classrooms and labs are top-notch, and our library is very superb and has all the books we require. It has excellent infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: College life and the follow-up view of medical colleges.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are very big and well-ventilated, with AC facilities. The classrooms are digital, and there is also a chalkboard. We have a central library for UG and PG students separately, and all the subject books are available. We have a separate reading room for all students and separate waiting halls for both girls and boys.

reviews.review_heading: It is a decent college for medical aspirants.
reviews.review_text: The lab equipment is modern and decent. There is a thousand-bedded hospital linked to the college. Many OP cases are seen each day. The college is air-conditioned. The college has 4 seminar halls and an auditorium with practical labs for each department.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty members who look after us as their children and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college provides very good labs with good facilities and good microscopes. The college provides the best classrooms with air-conditioner, comfortable seats, projector and screen so that everyone can see clearly. There are the best author books in the library, and everyone gets cubicle so that we can read comfortably. Hostel rooms are always good. Quality of food served is improving these days. Our college has to improve the section of sports and games in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with all facilities. Sports and games activities are conducted in our college. Tournaments are held in our college. The food served in the hostel is average, but they are trying to improve the quality of the food. The food served in the canteen is good. Medical facilities are available in our college.
